terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.acceptance_text: By accessing and using this weather application, you agree to comply with these Terms of Use.
terms.use_text: Our application provides real-time weather information. You agree to:
terms.use_item1: Use the application only for legal purposes
terms.use_item2: Do not overload our servers with excessive requests
terms.use_item3: Do not attempt to access restricted areas of the application
terms.accuracy_text: Weather information is provided by OpenWeatherMap. While we strive to provide accurate data, we do not guarantee accuracy, completeness or timeliness.
terms.liability_text: We are not responsible for direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages resulting from the use of our application.
terms.modifications_text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time.
terms.contact_text: If you have questions about these terms, contact us through our contact form.
